Package noppes.npcs.api

Interface ITelegraph

  • public interface ITelegraph
    A telegraph is a visual warning indicator that displays on the ground. Telegraphs are commonly used to warn players of incoming attacks or mark areas of effect.

    To create a telegraph: 

     var telegraph = API.getTelegraphs().createCircle(5.0);
 telegraph.setDuration(60); // 3 seconds
 telegraph.setColor(0x80FF0000); // Semi-transparent red
 var instance = telegraph.spawn(world, x, y, z);

    Telegraph types:

    • CIRCLE - A filled circle with a radius
    • RING - A ring with inner and outer radius
    • LINE - A rectangular line in a direction
    • CONE - A cone/arc shape
    • SQUARE - A square shape
    • POINT - A small point marker

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      float getAngle()
      Get the angle in degrees (for CONE type).
      int getColor()
      Get the primary color in ARGB format.
      int getDuration()
      Get the duration in ticks.
      float getHeightOffset()
      Get the height offset from ground level.
      float getInnerRadius()
      Get the inner radius (for RING type).
      float getLength()
      Get the length (for LINE and CONE types).
      float getRadius()
      Get the radius (for CIRCLE, SQUARE and RING types).
      String getType()
      Get the telegraph type.
      int getWarningColor()
      Get the warning phase color in ARGB format.
      int getWarningStartTick()
      Get the tick at which warning phase begins.
      float getWidth()
      Get the width (for LINE type).
      boolean isAnimated()
      Check if pulsing animation is enabled.
      void setAngle​(float angle)
      Set the angle in degrees (for CONE type).
      void setAnimated​(boolean animated)
      Enable or disable pulsing animation.
      void setColor​(int argb)
      Set the primary color in ARGB format.
      void setDuration​(int ticks)
      Set the duration in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second).
      void setHeightOffset​(float offset)
      Set the height offset from ground level.
      void setInnerRadius​(float innerRadius)
      Set the inner radius (for RING type).
      void setLength​(float length)
      Set the length (for LINE and CONE types).
      void setRadius​(float radius)
      Set the radius (for CIRCLE, SQUARE and RING types).
      void setType​(String type)
      Set the telegraph type.
      void setWarningColor​(int argb)
      Set the warning phase color in ARGB format.
      void setWarningStartTick​(int tick)
      Set the tick at which warning phase begins.
      void setWidth​(float width)
      Set the width (for LINE type).
      ITelegraphInstance spawn​(IEntity entity)
      Spawn this telegraph following an entity.
      ITelegraphInstance spawn​(IEntity entity, float yaw)
      Spawn this telegraph following an entity with rotation.
      ITelegraphInstance spawn​(IWorld world, double x, double y, double z)
      Spawn this telegraph at a position.
      ITelegraphInstance spawn​(IWorld world, double x, double y, double z, float yaw)
      Spawn this telegraph at a position with rotation.

    • Method Detail

      • getType

        String getType()
        Get the telegraph type.
        Returns:
        Type name: "CIRCLE", "RING", "LINE", "CONE", "SQUARE", or "POINT"

      • setType

        void setType​(String type)
        Set the telegraph type.
        Parameters:
        type - Type name: "circle", "ring", "line", "cone", "square", or "point" (case insensitive)

      • getRadius

        float getRadius()
        Get the radius (for CIRCLE, SQUARE and RING types).
        Returns:
        the circle/ring radius in blocks

      • setRadius

        void setRadius​(float radius)
        Set the radius (for CIRCLE, SQUARE and RING types).
        Parameters:
        radius - circle/ring radius in blocks

      • getInnerRadius

        float getInnerRadius()
        Get the inner radius (for RING type).
        Returns:
        the inner radius for RING type in blocks

      • setInnerRadius

        void setInnerRadius​(float innerRadius)
        Set the inner radius (for RING type).
        Parameters:
        innerRadius - inner radius for RING type in blocks

      • getLength

        float getLength()
        Get the length (for LINE and CONE types).
        Returns:
        the length for LINE/CONE types in blocks

      • setLength

        void setLength​(float length)
        Set the length (for LINE and CONE types).
        Parameters:
        length - length for LINE/CONE types in blocks

      • getWidth

        float getWidth()
        Get the width (for LINE type).
        Returns:
        the width for LINE type in blocks

      • setWidth

        void setWidth​(float width)
        Set the width (for LINE type).
        Parameters:
        width - width for LINE type in blocks

      • getAngle

        float getAngle()
        Get the angle in degrees (for CONE type).
        Returns:
        the arc angle for CONE type in degrees

      • setAngle

        void setAngle​(float angle)
        Set the angle in degrees (for CONE type).
        Parameters:
        angle - arc angle for CONE type in degrees

      • getDuration

        int getDuration()
        Get the duration in ticks.
        Returns:
        duration in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second)

      • setDuration

        void setDuration​(int ticks)
        Set the duration in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second).
        Parameters:
        ticks - duration in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second)

      • getColor

        int getColor()
        Get the primary color in ARGB format.
        Returns:
        the primary color in ARGB format

      • setColor

        void setColor​(int argb)
        Set the primary color in ARGB format. Example: 0x80FF0000 for semi-transparent red
        Parameters:
        argb - primary color in ARGB format (e.g. 0x80FF0000)

      • getWarningColor

        int getWarningColor()
        Get the warning phase color in ARGB format.
        Returns:
        the warning phase color in ARGB format

      • setWarningColor

        void setWarningColor​(int argb)
        Set the warning phase color in ARGB format. This color is used during the final warning phase.
        Parameters:
        argb - warning phase color in ARGB format

      • getWarningStartTick

        int getWarningStartTick()
        Get the tick at which warning phase begins.
        Returns:
        the tick at which warning phase begins

      • setWarningStartTick

        void setWarningStartTick​(int tick)
        Set the tick at which warning phase begins. When remaining ticks falls below this value, the telegraph uses the warning color.
        Parameters:
        tick - tick at which warning phase begins

      • isAnimated

        boolean isAnimated()
        Check if pulsing animation is enabled.
        Returns:
        true if pulsing animation is enabled

      • setAnimated

        void setAnimated​(boolean animated)
        Enable or disable pulsing animation.
        Parameters:
        animated - whether pulsing animation is enabled

      • getHeightOffset

        float getHeightOffset()
        Get the height offset from ground level.
        Returns:
        the height offset from ground level in blocks

      • setHeightOffset

        void setHeightOffset​(float offset)
        Set the height offset from ground level. Default is 0.1 to prevent z-fighting with ground blocks.
        Parameters:
        offset - height offset from ground level in blocks

      • spawn

        ITelegraphInstance spawn​(IWorld world,
                         double x,
                         double y,
                         double z)
        Spawn this telegraph at a position.
        Parameters:
        world - The world to spawn in
        x - X position
        y - Y position
        z - Z position
        Returns:
        The spawned telegraph instance

      • spawn

        ITelegraphInstance spawn​(IWorld world,
                         double x,
                         double y,
                         double z,
                         float yaw)
        Spawn this telegraph at a position with rotation.
        Parameters:
        world - The world to spawn in
        x - X position
        y - Y position
        z - Z position
        yaw - Rotation yaw (for directional telegraphs like LINE/CONE)
        Returns:
        The spawned telegraph instance

      • spawn

        ITelegraphInstance spawn​(IEntity entity)
        Spawn this telegraph following an entity. The telegraph will update its position to follow the entity.
        Parameters:
        entity - The entity to follow
        Returns:
        The spawned telegraph instance

      • spawn

        ITelegraphInstance spawn​(IEntity entity,
                         float yaw)
        Spawn this telegraph following an entity with rotation.
        Parameters:
        entity - The entity to follow
        yaw - Rotation yaw
        Returns:
        The spawned telegraph instance
